chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Appln. No. S – 658 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 17.10.2024 Mr. Iran Ali Shar, Advocate has filed vakalatnama on behalf of complainant, which is taken on record. Applicant and his Counsel are called absent. Office has made a note that applicant has not furnished the required surety. Under these circumstances, this bail application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge ARBROHI
